recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Next Door
recommendations.overview: After Ingrid leaves John, he allows himself to be pulled into a mystical and scary world where it is impossible to separate truth from lies.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Hungerford
recommendations.overview: The lives of a group of teenagers are turned upside down when their town is taken over by sinister forces.

recommendations.title: Assimilate
recommendations.overview: Three friends making a web series about their town discover that their neighbors are being killed and replaced by creatures who are perfect copies of their victims.

recommendations.title: Wildling
recommendations.overview: A young woman held in captivity discovers the realities of truth and lies in the outside world.

recommendations.title: 6 Souls
recommendations.overview: A female forensic psychiatrist discovers that all of one of her patient's multiple personalities are murder victims. She will have to find out what's happening before her time is finished.

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.
